titleStmt.title: SII 34.254: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 254. Tiruvēngavāsal, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the outer west wall of the first prākāra in the Vyāghrapurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Records an endowment of land by purchase by Chadiraṉ Irājaṉ alias Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-Kiḍārattaraiyaṉ of Peruvāy-nāḍu for performing sāntikkūttu six times during the Tiruvādirai festival in the month of Vaigāsi in front of the deity Chadiraviḍaṅga-Nāyaṉār set up by him. The land was assigned to a woman dancer Umaiyāḻvi alias Chadiraviḍaṅga-naṅgai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrīirācātirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu jayaciṅkakulakāla vaḷanāṭṭup peruvāy nāṭṭu Araiya
ṉ catiran Irācanāṉa kulōttuṅka cōḻak kiṭārattaraiyanēṉ tiruvēṅkaivāyil kōyililē nān Eḻuntaruḷuvitta catiraviṭaṅka nāyakaṟku
vaikācit tiruvātirai tirunāḷuṅ kaṇṭu tirunāḷukku kūttāṭukaikkuk kāṇiyākat tiruvēṅkaivāyil sabhaiyār pakkal vilai koṇṭu variyiliṟai
yiḻicci koṇṭa carukilivayalāna puravari vayalukku Ellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟkellai kuḷattu nīr kōvaikku mēṟkum tenpāṟkellai nīrvaṟa ku vaṭakkum
mēlpāṟkellai tiruvēṅkaivāyil kuḷattuk kuḷapaṭṭikkum pirāmaṇar cuṭukāṭṭu puṉcaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
neṭu kālukkum perunāṉkellai yuḷpaṭṭa Uṇṇilam moḻiviṉṟi koṇṭu Āṟukūttāṭuvārā cāntik
Umaiyāḻviyāna catiraviṭaṅka naṅkaikku naṅkaikkum pala ṅka tēvar
pala kaḷum māhēśvararum Irukka nīrvārttuk kuṭuttamaiyil Ittirunāḷukku Āṟu kūttu Āṭuvārākavum viḷaiyilum viḷaiyāviṭilum Ikkūttāṟum
m kala kāl kala nelluppaṭi peṟuvārākavum Ippaṭi cantirātittaval niṟpatāka ceytukuṭuttēṉ catiran Irācanāna kulōt
tuṅka cōḻa kiṭārattaraiya nēṉ Ivai paṉmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 34.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
